1: Neither chasten me in thy hot displeasure.
2: And thy hand presseth me sore.
3: Neither is there any is there any rest in my bones because of my sin.
4: As an heavy burden they are too heavy for me.
6: I go mourning all the day long.
7: And there is there is no soundness in my flesh.
8: I have roared by reason of the disquietness of my heart.
9: And my groaning is not hid from thee.
10: As for the light of mine eyes, it also is gone from me.
11: And my kinsmen stand afar off.
12: And they that seek my hurt speak mischievous things, and imagine deceits all the day long.
13: And I was I was as a dumb man that that openeth not his mouth.
14: And in whose mouth are are no reproofs.
15: Thou wilt hear, O Lord my God.
16: When my foot slippeth, they magnify themselves themselves against me.
17: And my sorrow is is continually before me.
18: I will be sorry for my sin.
19: And they that hate me wrongfully are multiplied.
20: Are mine adversaries; because I follow the thing that the thing that good is is .
21: O my God, be not far from me.
